span.p: • API Gateway handles authentication, routing, and rate limiting.

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; font-size: 12px !important; text-align: center; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: • Search service maintains indexed product catalog.

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; font-size: 12px !important; text-align: center; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;
color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; font-size: 12px !important; text-align: center; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: • Payment and shipping use external third-party providers.

div.style: color: rgb(51, 65, 85) !important; font-size: 12px !important; text-align: center; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: • Notification service sends order and delivery updates.
